1. @mia standing at a small market stall in early morning light, arranging baskets. No text, no subtitles.
2. @mia and @noah talking beside the stall as the market wakes up. No text, no subtitles.
3. @ivy peeking from behind the stall, watching the two of them. No text, no subtitles.
4. @noah walking away down the busy market lane. No text, no subtitles.
